before_day7_per_lead_tomorrow.if_ooo: Pause Day-7. Note return date. Resume day after return if within Day-14 window (return must be before 2026-05-25). 4-touchpoint limit applies.
before_day7_per_lead_tomorrow.if_wrong_person: Pause Day-7. Investigate correct contact. Log CHANGELOG.
